# Risk Officer Agent — Handoffs
Version: 1.0.0

## Outbound Handoffs
### ? Architect — request mitigation design for architectural risks
### ? Compliance — escalate regulatory/compliance risks
### ? Coordinator — return risk assessment to pipeline

## Inbound Handoffs
### ? Architect — receives architectural risk flags
### ? Coordinator — dispatches risk assessment task
### ? Validator — receives drift/hallucination threshold breach escalations
